code:
read_file(path: string) -> string is
    let reader = StreamReader(path);

    try
        return reader.read_to_end();
    finally
        reader.close(); // runs before the function returns
    yrt

fullSource:
read_file(path: string) -> string is
    let reader = StreamReader(path);

    try
        return reader.read_to_end();
    finally
        reader.close(); // runs before the function returns
    yrt
si
